themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Isaiah: (Vs. 4 and following) Because this is what the Lord says to m...". Word-study detail reinforces "אָ֑רֶץ: on the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

1: Woe, land of whirring wings Which lies beyond the rivers...
7: At that time a gift of tribute will be brought...
